description: Runs a notebook and waits for completion. Polls job status every 5 seconds until terminal state (Completed/Failed/Cancelled) or timeout.
notes: Without --wait, returns immediately with {"status":"accepted","jobId":"..."}. Use --parameters for notebook parameters: --parameters '[{"name":"p1","value":"v1","type":"Text"}]'. First run on small capacity can take 2-5 min (Spark cold start). Use --cancel-on-timeout to auto-cancel if timeout is reached.

query_examples.description: Get the job instance ID for further queries.
